title: Portmeirion Home & Gifts The Holly & Ivy Gravy Boat and Stand, Ceramic, Multi-Colour
description: Product Description Ideal for the Christmas season, the classically designed The Holly and the Ivy collection by Portmeirion will make a statement at any festive occasions from dinner parties to informal get-togethers. Featuring a botanical illustration of holly, perfectly synonymous with Christmas time, this green and red collection is a wonderful accompaniment to your yuletide celebrations. This striking collection features tableware, cookware, serving pieces, gifts and accessories to make cooking and eating a jolly occasion. Box Contains Gravy Boat & Stand
